description_long: This jet ski features a striking black and orange color scheme with bold, stylized graphics and text along its sides, including Japanese characters and a white bear illustration. The body is streamlined and angular, with two prominent pontoons forming a catamaran-style hull, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The cockpit area is compact, with a small windscreen and a visible handlebar assembly, suggesting a single-rider configuration. The surface appears to be made of hard, glossy composite materials, likely reinforced plastic or fiberglass, with some metallic and rubber components for structural and functional elements. The jet ski is adorned with several decals and logos, adding to its sporty, high-tech appearance. Overall, the design is sleek and aggressive, suitable for high-speed water navigation and urban recreational use.
description: A sleek, black and orange jet ski with bold graphics, a catamaran-style hull, and a compact cockpit for a single rider. The design is modern, sporty, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, bold graphics, Japanese text, and a white bear illustration on the hull.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin pontoon hulls, narrow cockpit, and the angular, aerodynamic shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar graphics, visible windscreen, and handlebar assembly.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open space between the pontoons and the back of the cockpit area.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized blue arrow logo is visible on the rear side panel of the hull, along with other graphic emblems and Japanese text.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is compact, black, and angular, with visible grips and a central control cluster, positioned behind a small windscreen.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, streamlined seat with a contoured shape, finished in black and orange, designed for one rider.
